hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" | { read -r f; [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; root=$(git -C "$(dirname "$f")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$root" && git add "$f" && git diff --cached --quiet || (git commit -m "Update $(basename "$f")" && git push); } 2>/dev/null || true
